projects.title: Firewall ROI Calculator
projects.description: Architected and independently developed a Next.js and React application that enables customers to calculate ROI, Total Cost of Ownership (TCO), Payback Period, and recommended Fortinet firewall sizing using reusable calculation engines and server-side rendering.

projects.title: Product Carbon Footprint Calculator
projects.description: Delivered product-level carbon footprint insights to global users by building interactive data visualizations with D3.js and managing complex application state using Redux Toolkit. Improved performance by 45% through dynamic imports and computation caching, and enhanced UI reliability by 30% through Redux-driven state architecture and optimized REST API integration.

projects.title: Firewall Upgrade Advisor
projects.description: Built a customer-facing application that recommends the most suitable firewall upgrade based on the customer's existing deployment and business requirements. Enhanced client-side data handling and state management, resulting in 40% more accurate results.

projects.title: OT Evaluation Tool
projects.description: End-to-end solution enabling clients to submit assessments and instantly receive Fortinet-branded security scores. Improved load time by 35% using React memoization and API batching, increased assessment completion by 25% through streamlined input flows and reduced form validation errors by 30%.

projects.title: Fortinet Marketing Website Redesign
projects.description: Led the end-to-end redesign and development of Fortinet's live marketing website revamping key pages including Homepage, Blog, Product & Solution, Labs, Cyber Glossary, and Press Releases. Delivered pixel-perfect, ADA-compliant, cross-browser compatible, and fully responsive UI from Figma designs across desktop, tablet, and mobile using CSS media queries. Implemented reusable UI components and multi-language support to enable scalable content delivery across global regions.

projects.title: NextGen Dashboard
projects.description: Built Dashboard enabling Kaiser staff to manage patient appointments, room assignments, and reduce wait times. Implemented department’s dashboard which has CRUD operations on appointments, real-time updates using WebSockets and improved room assignment logic.

projects.title: Health Plan Sales Application
projects.description: Developed a health plan sales application by integrating AEM with Angular 7, building checkout flow, consumer and broker dashboards, implemented session management, ACLs, security protocols, and optimized AEM content caching strategies to improve load times and scalability.

projects.title: E-Commerce Service Center
projects.description: Led the migration of Kohl’s E-Commerce Service Center from Oracle ATG to a modern React application, owning the full development lifecycle from architecture and implementation to deployment and optimization. Built scalable Node.js and Express backend services and secure agent dashboards with role-based access control, improving operational efficiency, security, and data accessibility for customer service teams.

projects.title: AMEX API portal
projects.description: Developed portal integrating React and Angular under one platform, improving API interactions and reducing latency. Developed User management, Signup Flow, Login, Form Validation and Product module in React.

projects.title: Internal Dev Portal
projects.description: Developed Internal Dev Portal from JSP to Angular 2.0, enhancing UI performance.
